card.name: Time Dilate
card.text: Take an extra turn after this one, then exile this spell. Flashback {U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Gitaxian Research
card.text: Surveil 5 (Look at the top five cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Aftershock
card.text: Deal 3 damage to any target. Whenever an opponent casts their second spell each turn, you may cast this spell from your graveyard without paying it's mana cost.

card.name: Stone Downpour
card.text: Destroy all nonbasic lands.

card.name: Enclosure Priest
card.text: If a land would enter the battlefield and it wasn't played, exile it instead.

card.name: Kor Wayshaper
card.text: When this creature enters, each player sacrifices a land.

card.name: Hogaak, the Unending
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Trample, deathtouch Whenever Hogaak leaves your graveyard, you may put it onto the battlefield.

card.name: Archon of the Spheres
card.text: Flying, vigilance, lifelink Whenever a nonland permanent would enter under an opponents control, if that player had three or more other nonland permanents enter this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Scion of Karn
card.text: When you cast this spell, copy it for each artifact you control. Nonartifact creature spells cost {1} more to cast.

card.name: Alhammarret's Intuition
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Your opponents can't draw more than one card each turn. If you would draw one or more cards, you draw that many plus one instead.

card.name: Temur Triome
card.text: ({T}: Add {G}, {U}, or {R}) When this land becomes tapped, you lose 1 life.

card.name: Sultai Triome
card.text: ({T}: Add {B}, {G}, or {U}) When this land becomes tapped, you lose 1 life.

card.name: Mardu Triome
card.text: ({T}: Add {R}, {W}, or {B}) When this land becomes tapped, you lose 1 life.

card.name: Jeskai Triome
card.text: ({T}: Add {U}, {R}, or {W}) When this land becomes tapped, you lose 1 life.

card.name: Abzan Triome
card.text: ({T}: Add {W}, {B}, or {G}) When this land becomes tapped, you lose 1 life.

card.name: Tibalt, Cruel Sadist
card.text: When Tibalt enters, create a 1/1 red devil creature token with "When this creature dies, it deals 1 damage to any target." Whenever Tibalt is dealt damage and survives, you may exile him, then return him to the battlefield transformed under his owner's control. --- (Back): Tibalt, Paincursed

card.name: Tibalt, Paincursed
card.text: --- (Front): Tibalt, Cruel Sadist

card.name: Recast
card.text: Exile target noncreature nonland card from your graveyard, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. If it's a permanent it enters with a finality counter on it, otherwise, exile it as it resolves.

card.name: Storm Fiend
card.text: Storm (When you cast this spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn. Copies become tokens.)

card.name: Prayer to Sveylun
card.text: Choose one — • Counter target noncreature spell. • Draw 2 cards. You may exile a blue card from your hand rather than pay this spells mana cost.

card.name: Prayer to Rhonas
card.text: Choose one — • Exile target artifact or enchantment • Target player puts all cards from their graveyard on the bottom of their library in a random order. You may exile a green card from your hand rather than pay this spells mana cost.

card.name: Prayer to Purphuros
card.text: Choose one — • Each player discards their hand then draws 5 cards. • Deal 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker. You may exile a red card from your hand rather than pay this spells mana cost.

card.name: Prayer to Egon
card.text: Choose one — • Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. • Target player discards two cards at random. You may exile a black card from your hand rather than pay this spells mana cost.

card.name: Prayer to Avacyn
card.text: Choose one — • Artifacts and creatures you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. • Target opponent can't cast spells this turn. You may exile a white card from your hand rather than pay this spells mana cost.

card.name: Grixis Triome
card.text: ({T}: Add {U}, {B}, or {R}) When this land becomes tapped, you lose 1 life.

card.name: Esper Triome
card.text: ({T}: Add {W}, {U}, or {B}) When this land becomes tapped, you lose 1 life.

card.name: Naya Triome
card.text: ({T}: Add {R}, {G}, or {W}) When this land becomes tapped, you lose 1 life.

card.name: Bant Triome
card.text: ({T}: Add {G}, {W}, or {U}) When this land becomes tapped, you lose 1 life.

card.name: Jund Triome
card.text: ({T}: Add {B}, {R}, or {G}) When this land becomes tapped, you lose 1 life.

card.name: Mox Pyrite
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {R} or {W}.

card.name: Mox Charcoal
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {B} or {R}.

card.name: Mox Bismuth
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Mox Roselite
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {R} or {G}.

card.name: Mox Quartz
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: Mox Amethyst
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Mox Obsidian
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {U} or {B}.

card.name: Mox Topaz
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {W}.

card.name: Mox Turquoise
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {U}.

card.name: Mox Tourmaline
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.name: Dredge the Depths
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Mill five cards, then you may return a permanent card from among them to your hand.

card.name: From the Grave
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield, you lose life equal to its power. Flashback {B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Phyrexian Gladiator
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, target player draws a card and lose 1 life. Swampcycling {0} ({0}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Swamp card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Fomori Rallier
card.text: Exile this card from your graveyard: Target creature must block this turn if able. Mountaincycling {0} ({0}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Mountain card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Simian Spirit Guide
card.text: Exile this card from your hand: Add {R}.

card.name: Elvish Spirit Guide
card.text: Exile this card from your hand: Add {G}.

card.name: Merrow Spirit Guide
card.text: Exile this card from your hand: Add {U}.

card.name: Skeletal Spirit Guide
card.text: Exile this card from your hand: Add {B}.

card.name: Angelic Spirit Guide
card.text: Exile this card from your hand: Add {W}.

card.name: Mana Warp
card.text: Add three mana of any one color.

card.name: Birgi's Harbinger
card.text: When this creature enters, add two mana of any one color.

card.name: Polymorphists Caravan
card.text: When this artifact enters create a 1/1 Illusion creature token. When this vehicle attacks, sacrifice a creature that crewed it this turn, when you do, reveal card from the top of your library until you reveal a creature card. Put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle. Crew 1

card.name: Immutable Plans
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant spell during your main phase, copy it, you may choose new targets for the copy.

Blitz {B}{R} (If you cast this spell for its blitz cost, it gains haste and "When this creature dies, draw a card". Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.) Whenever a creature you control dies, if it attacked this turn, create a Treasure, then if it entered this turn, create another Treasure.

card.name: Gate of Benedictions
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell for its miracle cost, reveal the top card of your library, if it has miracle you may cast it for its miracle cost, otherwise put it into your hand. Miracle {0} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: Dark Blessing
card.text: Search your library for a card, and put it into your hand, then shuffle. You lose 2 life. Miracle {B} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: Hectos, Titan of Mana's Roil
card.text: When Hectos enters, sacrifice it unless it escaped. Whenever Hectos enters or attacks, search your library for a land card and put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Escape—{G}{G}{W}{W}, Exile five other cards from your graveyard.

card.name: Tempus, Titan of Time's Ruin
card.text: When Tempus enters, sacrifice it unless it escaped. Whenever Tempus enters or attacks, target player reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card. You lose 2 life. Escape—{U}{U}{B}{B}, Exile five other cards from your graveyard.

card.name: Griselbrand, Unsealed
card.text: Flying, lifelink When Griselbrand enters, exile the top seven cards of each opponents library face down. You may look at cards exiled with Griselbrand and may play lands and cast spells from among them without paying their mana cost.

card.name: Stormbrain
card.text: Storm (When you cast this spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn. Copies become tokens.) When this creature enters, draw three cards, then put two cards from your hand on top of your library in any order.

card.name: Ashiok, Dream Seeker
card.text: {T}: Draw a card, discard a card, then exile the top card of your library with a dream counter on it. Then if you own four or more cards in exile, you may exile Ashiok, then return them to the battlefield transformed under their owner's control. --- (Back): Ashiok, Nightmare Born

card.name: Ashiok, Nightmare Born
card.text: --- (Front): Ashiok, Dream Seeker

card.name: Calix, Fate-Sworn
card.text: When Calix or another enchantment you control enters, you draw a card and gain a life. Whenever another enchantment you control leaves the battlefield, you may exile Calix then return him to the battlefield transformed under his owner's control. --- (Back): Calix, Fate-Bound

card.name: Calix, Fate-Bound
card.text: --- (Front): Calix, Fate-Sworn

card.name: Narset, Ojutai's Faithful
card.text: Whenever you cast a historic spell, scry 1. Then you may reveal the top card of your library. If a historic card is revealed this way, you may exile Narset, then return her to the battlefield tapped under her owner's control. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.) --- (Back): Narset, Eyes Opened

card.name: Narset, Eyes Opened
card.text: --- (Front): Narset, Ojutai's Faithful

card.name: Ulamog's Wake
card.text: Whenever one or more cards you own are put into exile from anywhere other than the battlefield, put a defile counter each of them. {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Choose a card you own in exile with a defile counter on it, you may play it this turn.
Whenever you cast a spell, if no mana was spent to cast it, draw a card.

card.name: Oblivion Signet
card.text: Eerie — Whenever this enchantment or another enchantment you control enters and whenever you fully unlock a room, exile target nonland permanent until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Mage-Ring Guard
card.text: Whenever this card leaves your graveyard, add {U}. Islandcycling {0} ({0}, Discard this card: Search your library for an Island card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Stone Guardian
card.text: Flying Whenever you attack, target attacking creature gains flying until end of turn. Plainscycling {0} ({0}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: World Ooze's Trail
card.text: Deathtouch When this creature enters, destroy target artifact, enchantment, or nonbasic land. Forestcycling {0} ({0}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Bring Back
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Sylvan Guardian
card.text: Whenever a land is put into your graveyard from anywhere, target creature you control gains hexproof until end of turn. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice a land: Search your library for a land and put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Consulate Informant
card.text: This creature can't be blocked. When this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card then discard a card.

card.name: Windswept Heath
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Forest or Plains card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Polluted Delta
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for an Island or Swamp card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Misty Rainforest
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Forest or Island card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Scalding Tarn
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for an Island or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Arid Mesa
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Mountain or Plains card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Bloodstained Mire
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Swamp or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Flooded Strand
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Plains or Island card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Marsh Flats
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Plains or Swamp card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Wooded Foothills
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Mountain or Forest card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Verdant Catacombs
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Swamp or Forest card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Fear of War
card.text: Exile target creature that entered this turn, its controller gains 3 life.

card.name: Manachaser
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, copy target instant or sorcery spell you control. If no mana was spent to cast that spell, copy it an additional time.

card.name: Overwhelming Will
card.text: Return any number of target spells to their owners hands. Draw a card for each spell returned this way.

card.name: Storm Strike
card.text: Deal 1 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If you've cast another spell this turn, this spell deals 3 damage to the chosen target instead.

card.name: Verdant Overflow
card.text: Search your library for two land cards and put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Wild Ritual
card.text: Untap target land, until end of turn, whenever that land is tapped for mana, its controlled adds three times that much mana instead.

card.name: Bloodrage
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield, it gains haste until end of turn. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Whenever that creature is dealt damage this turn, create a tapped treasure token.

card.name: Sanctum of Eternity
card.text: Whenever another enchantment you control enters, untap all basic lands you control.

card.name: Living Leyline
card.text: If this enchantment is in your opening hand, you may begin the game with it on the battlefield. Artifact and enchantment spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Dismember
card.text: Target creature gets -5/-5 until end of turn.

card.name: Prohibit
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {1}.

card.name: Engulf
card.text: Deal 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Reclaim
card.text: Exile target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Forget
card.text: Put target creature into its owner's library third from the top.

card.name: Muldrotha, Rotbloom
card.text: As long as Muldrotha is in your graveyard and there are 5 or more cards in your graveyard, you may play lands and cast permanent spells from your graveyard. Dredge 3 (If you would draw a card, you may mill three cards instead. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand.)
You may pay 1 life and exile a colorless card from your hand rather than pay the mana cost of artifact spells you cast.

card.name: Rotting Baloth
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Trample This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each card you own in exile.
Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Draw three cards then discard a card.

card.name: Forced Prayer
card.text: The first card you draw each turn has miracle {2} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.) Whenever you cast a spell for its miracle cost, sacrifice this enchantment.

card.name: Ring of Fire
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}{C}.

card.name: Thran Dragon Engine
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature or another nonland permanent you control enters, you may discard a card, if you do, draw a card.

card.name: Monoist Mutilator
card.text: When this creature enters or dies, exile target creature, its controller creates a food token.

card.name: Bloodsoaked Lotus
card.text: Morbid — {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add three mana of any one color. Activate this ability only if a creature died this turn.

card.name: Immersturm Conqueror
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, it deals 3 damage to each creature that attacked this turn. Create a treasure token for each creature that dies this way.

card.name: Nyxbloom Prodigy
card.text: Lands you control have "{T}: Add {G}{G}."

card.name: Xenagos, Violent Hedonist
card.text: Whenever Xenagos or another creature you control enters, Xenagos deals 1 damage to each opponent. Then if three or more creatures entered under your control this turn, you may exile Xenagos, then return him to the battlefield transformed under his owner's control. --- (Back): Xenagos, King Stranger

card.name: Xenagos, King Stranger
card.text: --- (Front): Xenagos, Violent Hedonist

card.name: Black Lotus
card.text: {T}: Sacrifice this artifact: Add three mana of any one color.

card.name: Mind Accelerant
card.text: Draw a card, if you've cast another spell this turn, draw three cards instead.

card.name: Voltaic Gamble
card.text: Exile the top three cards of your library, you may play them this turn. Whenever you cast your third spell from exile this turn, add {R}{R}{R}{R}.

card.name: Endless Windfall
card.text: Storm (When you cast this spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn.) Create a treasure token.

card.name: Phyrexian Monolith
card.text: {T}: Add {B} {T}, Exile a permanent card from your graveyard: Add {B}{B}.

card.name: Violent Twister
card.text: Each player exiles their hand and graveyard, then draws seven cards, then exile this spell.

card.name: Precognize
card.text: Draw a card, then surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)
